tips_and_tricks_s2.source: Fan Work ULG - Season 2 community guides
preparation: Unlock Victory Tower (Lv.3) to gain +5°C on your base, plus Recon Aircraft (+4°C Lv.2)
The Frozen Castle base skin provides temperature bonuses
Give 10 likes per day on bases during the season to receive speedups
Boost HQ production right after Season 1 to offset temperature drop at start of Season 2
Send trucks just before season begins (0:09 server time) - they will auto-complete route when Season 2 map loads, securing 3 free truck deliveries at very start
combat_optimization: Hit a Doomwalker every day - ideally level 190 for the best First Blood score
Before fighting a Wanted Boss, heat your base as high as safely possible — maximum safe temperature is just below 50°C. At 50°C the base starts burning (5 minute countdown). Do NOT overheat.
If buying Season Battle Pass, get it on Day 1 to level up Alloy Factories ASAP and generate a large alloy lead

alloy_factory_strategy.weekly_pass_warning: Do NOT upgrade the gifted Alloy Factory first - do it LAST. It is far more efficient to:
steps: 1. Upgrade your FIRST Alloy Factory to Lv.15
2. Then unlock the SECOND to Lv.15
3. Do the same to reach a third, fourth and fifth factory
4. This strategy gives a massive economic advantage - then group the level increases above 15
alloy_factory_strategy.note: Each factory unlocks the next when it reaches level 15. The gifted Weekly Pass factory should be upgraded last as it has lower costs.

temperature_survival: Some Saturdays: Cold Wave drops the map to -50°C / -60°C for 4 hours
Keep at least 300,000 Coal stored safely for these events (5,000-10,000 on Day 1)
Enable Auto Mode or Auto-Overdrive during blizzards
Always place your HQ near the Alliance Furnace (zone bonus)
If in a cold zone, move your HQ near a heated city or active furnace

violet_strategy: Target Honor Wall 60 for Violet (or 160 for optimal)
Accumulate 500k Skill Medals, invest everything into Violet to promote her to UR
You'll get her fragments refunded (1.6k) and all medals returned - perfect to aim for Thursday MVP

wanted_boss_tips.score_bonus: Heat your base before attacking Wanted Boss for a score bonus. Maximum safe temperature is just below 50°C — at exactly 50°C the base starts burning with a 5-minute countdown. Never heat to 70°C, that is not achievable without triggering the fire mechanic.
wanted_boss_tips.temperature_warning: Base burns at ≥50°C. A 5-minute fire countdown starts at 50°C. Keep temperature at 49°C or below during boss attacks to stay safe.
wanted_boss_tips.timing: Attack AFTER Hero Advancement phase of Arms Race for maximum power
wanted_boss_tips.war_fever: Use War Fever before every boss attack for +1% power boost
wanted_boss_tips.ranking: Rankings based on highest single-attack damage per day

skills_season_2.source: Fan Work ULG - Skills Season 2 guide
skills_season_2.advice: Focus EXCELLENT priority skills first. Level 1 and 10 EXF skills are top priority with 3 points each.

season_2_overview.objective: Push toward center of Polar Region, keep bases heated, strengthen troop resistance, produce maximum Rare Soil before season ends

key_mechanics.polar_cities: Cities equipped with heating systems disabled by Boreas. Reclaim to reactivate Furnaces and increase temperature.
key_mechanics.rare_soil: Captured cities generate Rare Soil - the key seasonal resource. Final alliance ranking based on total amount produced.
key_mechanics.alliance_furnace: After controlling outskirts, advance Alliance Furnace deeper into Polar Region

temperature_states.on_fire: ≥50°C - Base starts burning, 5-minute countdown begins. Loses durability. Can be extinguished manually or by allies. Maximum safe temperature is 49°C.
temperature_states.frozen: ≤-20°C - Relocation and rallies disabled, units frozen
temperature_states.break_the_ice: Required to attack or capture a frozen base. Consumes Stamina, grants Profession EXP.
temperature_states.warm_up: Warm up allied bases. Done via Recon Aircraft, consumes Coal.
temperature_states.frost_and_snow: Below 0°C = ground frozen. Above 0°C = melting reveals hidden resources.
temperature_states.blizzard: Sudden temperature drop. Occurs at intervals with varying intensity.

seasonal_resources.coal: Core resource mined from Dig Sites. Used to build and fuel Furnaces.
seasonal_resources.titanium_alloy: Produced in Titanium Alloy Factory. Used to upgrade Furnaces.
seasonal_resources.high_heat_furnace: Seasonal structure increasing temperature and virus resistance. Overload mode = more heat but higher consumption.
seasonal_resources.alliance_furnace: Heats the Alliance area. Can enter Overload mode. Dismantled after season.

season_2_overview.end_of_season: All seasonal structures are dismantled and remaining resources converted into Profession EXP.
